The botanical composition of birch and spruce is standard for the Swedish boreal/temperate transition zone. It provides no unique diagnostic value to separate it from Norway or Finland.

Sweden uses right-hand traffic and similar road standards. While the language is similar, the specific terminology on the van is Danish rather than Swedish.

The white vans are a very common sight in Denmark, and the specific style of the low, manicured hedge bordering the property is highly characteristic of Danish residential/commercial landscaping. Additionally, the architecture of the house on the left with dark vertical siding and white window frames is a common modern Danish style.
